input.description: Weekly essay newsletter covering economic history and what past crises teach us about the present
input.voice: Calm, authoritative, slightly contrarian. Former economic historian, left academia.
input.cta: Reply with what you want to understand better

test_cases.output_summary: 200-word welcome email opening with a hook that subverts the expected 'Welcome!' opener. Specific editorial promise (1,200-1,800 word essays, primary sources), clear cadence, archive link, single reply CTA, Gmail whitelist postscript. Signed personally.

input.description: Biweekly newsletter about emerging technology policy — AI regulation, data rights, platform governance — for policy professionals and tech journalists
input.voice: Precise, neutral, rigorous. Never breathless. References primary sources.
input.cta: Whitelist and save to a reading folder
input.paid_tier: Paid subscribers get a Friday briefing with primary source links and an annotated policy document

test_cases.output_summary: Welcome email opens with a clear framing of what 'Futures Dispatch' is not (punditry, reaction takes) before stating what it is. Introduces free/paid distinction without hard-selling. Whitelist instructions included. Precise professional register throughout. Subject line included.

input.description: Weekly newsletter for small-scale farmers and market gardeners — practical growing advice, crop economics, and stories from people farming under 5 acres
input.voice: Practical, direct, unpretentious. Occasional dry humor. Reads like advice from someone who's made all the mistakes.
input.cta: Reply with your biggest current growing challenge
input.personal_origin: Started after the writer's first full season farming and realising most advice online was for large commercial operations

test_cases.output_summary: Welcome email opens with a grounded personal note about why the newsletter exists, uses 'you' throughout to address small farmers directly, editorial promise is practical ('what to plant, when to sell, what not to bother with'), strong reply CTA with specific prompt. Conversational and unpretentious throughout.
